# Pull Request

Thanks for improving **Stunspot’s Guide to AI Systems**.

## Change Type

- [ ] Typo, formatting, or clarity fix
- [ ] Broken link or path correction
- [ ] Citation, source-quality, or provenance note
- [ ] Metadata/manifests/docs alignment fix
- [ ] Other maintenance change

## Scope

List the changed files:

-

## Rationale

Explain why this change improves the canon, repository navigation, citation hygiene, or model/RAG ingestion clarity.

## Checks

- [ ] I preserved this repo’s existing directory policy: canonical source reports live in `docs/`, bundled knowledge packs live in `knowledge-packs/`.
- [ ] I did not move corpus files or change knowledge-pack structure without clear justification.
- [ ] I did not change license terms or author attribution without clear justification.
- [ ] Links and paths introduced by this PR are valid.
- [ ] The change is suitable for a model-facing knowledge canon, not only human browsing.
